positive: A minimalist, intricate geometric constellation pattern forming a guiding celestial map. The main subjects are elegant, stylized astral paths and abstract star clusters rendered in a clean, single-line style. The composition should be highly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for all apparel prints. Use a limited palette of deep midnight blue, glowing cyan, and ethereal gold line art. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and cosmic futurism, emphasizing negative space and strong, clean silhouettes. Highly detailed, vector art quality, UHD, print-ready.
